attacking_style: Late-climb accelerations in final 2km or 800m from finish on steep gradients, attempting to gain time bonuses or recover earlier losses rather than long-range moves.
team_tactics: Frequently exposed by weak team positioning in critical moments (crosswinds, splits, echelons). Teams consistently fail to protect him tactically, forcing solo chase efforts or leaving him caught behind moves.
terrain_preference: Steep mountain finishes where pure climbing power decides (dropped Froome in final 2km at Dauphiné). Vulnerable on technical descents (crashed at 45mph matching Froome) and in crosswinds/echelon situations.
vulnerability: Catastrophic positioning errors cost massive time (15min in crosswinds, 2:53 from poor placement). Mechanicals and illness at critical race moments (mechanical on Tour podium run, illness at Vuelta). Technical descent limitations under pressure.
key_patterns: Caught in crosswind splits/echelons repeatedly across teams (Paris-Nice 2017/2020, Tour 2019), positioning weakness pattern.
Poor positioning before decisive climbs costs 11-41 seconds (Tirreno descent, Dauphiné chase, Tour 2020).
Bounces back from disasters to win stages (15min down to stage win Paris-Nice 2017).
Teams fail to protect him tactically, forcing solo chase work (Dauphiné 2019, Tour splits).
Fades in longer efforts after strong starts (Romandie ITT halfway fastest then faded).
Career-stage decline visible 2021-2022: losing to injured teammates, caught in domestique splits, unexpected form drops.
form_trajectory: negative: 2021-2022 shows clear decline—caught in 30-rider split as domestique, lost to injured Yates, positioning errors at age 37 versus podium at 35 in 2020
